extracted.title: Nexus Pipeline Conditions for 4/22/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day April 22, 2026, Nexus Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to NEXUS's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding NEXUS's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations:
- Hanoverton (Notes: Due to Nexus Posted Outage)
- Meter N2001 Receipts (Notes: Due to Nexus Posted Outage)
- All Vector Meters Downstream of Milford Junction N4MJ1 (Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage)
- Belle River (Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage)
- Ypsilanti (Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage)

OFO / Imbalance Notice section present; OFO shown as '---'.
affectedLocations: All Vector Meters Downstream of Milford Junction N4MJ1
